stories.title: Multi-tenant data baseline with row-level isolation
Staff identity — provider port + Entra adapter (first)
Client identity — provider port + Entra External ID adapter (first)
Staff web app shell (routing, auth guard, layout)
Provider & client app shells (Flutter) + shared packages
Platform services: background jobs, scheduler & media storage
De-risk spikes (auth, RLS, autopay, mapping canvas, offline sync)
Staff credential & CPD records + expiry alerts
Consult gate (no charting without a consult)
Payment provider abstraction (Square adapter, tokens only)
Client app: memberships, rewards, balances, card-on-file
Client app: reminders, recall & report a concern
Provider app: day schedule & open patient
Provider app: room-side charting, mapping & camera
Provider app: consult, Rx & administration room-side
